member.name: T:OpenSorSe.AI.JsonDecisionHistoryStore
member.summary: Stores bounded local preference decisions in a versioned JSON file outside scan results and user folders.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.AI.JsonDecisionHistoryStore.#ctor(System.String,OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Initializes local decision-history persistence at an explicit application-data path.
member.param: The rooted JSON history path owned by OpenSorSe.
The central redacted diagnostic logging service.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaEndpointNormalizer
member.summary: Normalizes supported user-entered Ollama endpoints for all transport operations.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaEndpointNormalizer.TryNormalize(System.String,System.Uri@)
member.summary: Creates one credential-free trailing-slash base URI shared by every Ollama request.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaSuggestionProvider
member.summary: Implements the provider-neutral suggestion boundary against Ollama.

member.name: M:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaSuggestionProvider.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,OpenSorSe.Core.Logging.ILoggingService)
member.summary: Initializes the transport with one caller-owned reusable HTTP client.

member.name: T:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaTransportLimits
member.summary: Defines fixed memory and presentation bounds for the optional Ollama-compatible transport.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaTransportLimits.MaximumPromptBytes
member.summary: Gets the maximum UTF-8 request prompt size accepted by the provider boundary.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaTransportLimits.MaximumResponseBytes
member.summary: Gets the maximum response body read from a configured provider endpoint.

member.name: F:OpenSorSe.AI.OllamaTransportLimits.MaximumPublishedModelCount
member.summary: Gets the maximum number of validated model identifiers published to the UI.
